headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Whipsaw Into Trump's Iran War Deadline; Apple, Tesla Slump
summary: The stock market closed narrowly mixed after whipsaw action ahead of Trump's Iran War deadline at 8 p.m. ET.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Whipsaw Into Trump's Iran War Deadline; Apple, Tesla Slump

headline: Teradyne (TER) Is Up 14.1% After AI Test Launches And ARK Trim - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Teradyne recently reported strong fiscal 2025 results, launched new AI-focused semiconductor test platforms such as Omnyx and Photon 100, and continued expanding its robotics and China operations while preparing to report its next earnings on April 29, 2026. At the same time, ARK Invest trimmed its Teradyne position even as institutional interest and analyst confidence remain high, underscoring differing views on how AI-driven test and robotics demand may shape the company’s future. Now...

headline: TER Rides on Accelerating Data Center Growth: A Sign for More Upside?
summary: Teradyne rides on booming AI data center demand, with AI apps driving more than 60% of revenue and new platforms boosting its test solutions portfolio.
